summary: Tested Manual Consumption Mode for Packing and Admin-Only Restrictions. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - manual consumption field appears for Lassi 500ml (quantity_consumed=0), does NOT appear for Paneer-1kg (fixed ratio). Activity Log and Wastage Tracker correctly hidden for non-admin users.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Dahi->Lassi 500ml has quantity_consumed=0 (manual consumption mode)
BACKEND: Paneer->Paneer-1kg has quantity_consumed=1.0 (fixed ratio mode)
BACKEND: POST /api/packing-by-product without semi_finished_consumed fails for manual SKUs (400)
BACKEND: POST /api/packing-by-product with semi_finished_consumed works correctly
BACKEND: Semi-finished stock deducted by semi_finished_consumed amount
BACKEND: Existing Dahi stock calculation correct (50kg produced - 20kg consumed = 30kg)
BACKEND: PUT /api/packing/{id} with semi_finished_consumed updates correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/activity-logs returns 200 for admin
BACKEND: GET /api/activity-logs returns 403 for non-admin
BACKEND: GET /api/activity-logs/categories returns 403 for non-admin
BACKEND: Wastage summary API accessible (UI restriction is frontend-only)
BACKEND: Fixed ratio packing works without semi_finished_consumed (auto-calculated)
FRONTEND: Admin sees Activity Log in sidebar
FRONTEND: Admin sees Wastage & Loss Tracker on Dashboard
FRONTEND: Packing form shows 'DAHI USED' field for Lassi 500ml (manual consumption)
FRONTEND: Packing form does NOT show manual consumption field for Paneer-1kg (fixed ratio)
FRONTEND: Non-admin does NOT see Activity Log in sidebar
FRONTEND: Non-admin does NOT see User Management in sidebar
FRONTEND: Non-admin does NOT see Wastage & Loss Tracker on Dashboard
FRONTEND: Non-admin does NOT see Entry Lock, Initial Stock Balances, Data Backup sections
critical_code_review_comments: Manual consumption logic correctly implemented in semi_finished_routes.py - checks quantity_consumed=0 or semi_finished_consumed provided
isManualConsumption helper in SemiFinishedProduct.js correctly identifies SKUs with quantity_consumed=0
Activity routes properly restrict access with role check at start of each endpoint
Dashboard.js correctly uses user?.role === 'admin' conditional rendering for admin-only sections
Layout.js correctly adds Activity Log and User Management to navigation only for admin role
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_manual_consumption.py - Created comprehensive test suite for manual consumption and admin restrictions
seed_data_creation: Test user test_nonadmin created and deleted during testing. Test packing entries created and deleted during API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual consumption mode fully functional. Key behavior: When semi-finished master mapping has quantity_consumed=0, the packing form shows a manual input field (e.g., 'DAHI USED') for the user to enter how much semi-finished product was consumed. For fixed ratio SKUs (quantity_consumed > 0), the consumption is auto-calculated. Admin-only restrictions working: Activity Log and Wastage Tracker hidden from non-admin users in both sidebar and dashboard. API endpoints /api/activity-logs and /api/activity-logs/categories return 403 for non-admin users.

manual_consumption_packing.behavior: Shows 'DAHI USED' input field in packing form, requires semi_finished_consumed in API

fixed_ratio_packing.behavior: No manual input field, consumption auto-calculated as qty_per_unit * quantity_produced

admin_only_activity_log.ui_restriction: Activity Log link hidden from sidebar for non-admin

admin_only_wastage_tracker.ui_restriction: Wastage & Loss Tracker section hidden from Dashboard for non-admin
